visualizations.title: Three Laws of Exponents
visualizations.description: Formulas for Product, Quotient, and Power rules.

spec.main_latex: \begin{aligned} a^m \times a^n &= a^{m+n} \\[0.5em] \frac{a^m}{a^n} &= a^{m-n} \\[0.5em] (a^m)^n &= a^{m \times n} \end{aligned}

steps.explanation: Product Rule: Add exponents when multiplying terms with the same base.
Quotient Rule: Subtract exponents when dividing terms with the same base.
Power Rule: Multiply exponents when raising a power to another power.

visualizations.title: Product Rule Demonstration
visualizations.description: Watch how 2^3 x 2^2 merges into 5 factors of 2, validating the Product Rule.
